sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30408" key="e)gkrati/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκρατ-ίτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n30408.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">member of the Encratite sect,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Theod.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.5.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
